memory.recent_lessons_md:
## July 9, 2026 — Daily Review

**3 things that worked:**
1. Market-Open and Mid-Morning both fired on schedule — the 13:45Z and 15:10Z cron slots are reliable.
2. AMD thesis technically intact through last confirmed data ($513.92 > stop $481.42).
3. Exit deadline tracking (AMD/IBM July 20 EOD) is being maintained accurately in every log entry.

**3 things to improve:**
1. 4 of 7 routines silently failing — Pre-Market, Midday, Afternoon, Market-Close all dark. Operator must audit cron schedule.
2. AMD naked Day 20 — must be sold immediately; both an over-cap violation AND an earnings-deadline forced exit by July 20.
3. IBM entry window closing rapidly — 7 trading days to enter and exit before July 20 EOD; if API not restored today, only operator manual entry can capture this trade.
